utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items appear. Now check full specification per item: (1) health_coverage: explicitly includes physical and mental health insurance with costs (monthly costs provided and a total health monthly cost). Fully specified. (2) property_coverage: home/contents insurance with costs is provided (coverage details and monthly cost). Fully specified. (3) travel_coverage: travel insurance with costs is provided (coverage details and monthly cost). Fully specified. (4) additional_services: enhancement services listed with costs or indicating included at no cost. Fully specified. (5) total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown with new monthly, annual (with discount), previous costs, savings, start date, and payment method. Fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each selected item in the final coverage plan to the exact item names in the ground-truth ratings and return their ratings. The final plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health), InsurePlus Standard Plan (mental health under InsurePlus Mental Health Network), InsurePlus Standard Coverage (property), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel). We locate these in the ground-truth and extract their ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan under primary_health_coverage.physical_health has rating 9; InsurePlus Standard Plan under primary_health_coverage.mental_health has rating 8; InsurePlus Standard Coverage under property_protection.home_content has rating 9; PrimeTravel Premium Plan under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance has rating 6.
